questions.question: Which institution organises ‘Project Udbhav’?
questions.explanation: The Indian Army, in partnership with the United Service Institution of India (USI), recently orgnised a hybrid panel discussion as part of Project Udbhav. Project Udbhav, initiated by the Indian Army, is a program designed to reexamine the deep-rooted Indian traditions of statecraft and strategic thinking, drawing insights from ancient Indian texts on statecraft, warfare, diplomacy, and grand strategy.

questions.question: As per a recent study, which species produces food grains as much as 140 million tonnes of food annually?
questions.explanation: A recent study has highlighted that earthworms play an equivalent role in global food production to that of Russia, contributing to around 140 million tonnes of food annually. If earthworms were considered a country, their food production would make them the fourth-largest global producer, trailing only behind Russia, which produced 150 million tonnes in 2022 and expects to produce 120 million tonnes this year.

questions.question: Online gaming companies will charge 28% GST on full value of bets, with effect from which date?
questions.explanation: From October 1, online gaming companies will charge 28% GST on full value of bets, while offshore platforms would also be required to have GST registration to operate in India. The notification was released by the Union Finance Ministry though many states are yet to pass amendments in their respective state GST Laws.

questions.question: Mohamed Muizzu was elected as the President of which country?
questions.explanation: Front runner and Opposition candidate Mohamed Muizzu was recently elected President of the Maldives. The opposition candidate beats the incumbent President Ibrahim Mohamed Solih, who is considered pro-India.

questions.question: Which country’s Supreme Court constituted a ‘Committee on accessibility’ and appointed a sign language interpreter?
questions.explanation: The Supreme Court of India (SC) appointed a sign language interpreter to help hearing-impaired lawyers and litigants understand judicial proceedings. The interpreter will be present for all Constitution bench hearings. The appointment of a sign language interpreter will make the judicial system more inclusive and accessible. CJI D Y Chandrachud also constituted a Supreme Court committee on accessibility last year.

questions.question: Which country is the host of ‘Exercise Bright Star’?
questions.explanation: The Indian Air Force’s (IAF) MiG-29 fighter jets participated in the Exercise Bright Star in Egypt. It was a biennial multilateral tri-services exercise held at the Cairo Air Base in Egypt. The exercise involved nine countries, including India, in combat training and demonstrations.

questions.question: Which organisation releases forecast on global merchandise trade growth?
questions.explanation: The World Trade Organisation (WTO) has scaled down global merchandise trade growth forecast to 0.8 %. The projection is less than 1.7 percent increase forecasted in April. The institution said its 3.3 percent growth projection for 2024 remains unchanged from the previous estimate. WTO expects real world GDP to grow by 2.6 percent at market exchange rates in 2023 and by 2.5 percent in 2024.

questions.question: Which institution has launched a platform called SnapFlood to contribute flood-related information?
questions.explanation: Researchers announce the launch of a platform called SnapFlood to encourage citizens to contribute flood-related information. The Urban Flood Information System (UFIS) which is being developed by IIT Hyderabad researchers, will help minimize the impact of urban flooding in Hyderabad.

questions.question: ‘Hamas’ is a militant group which originated in which country/region?
questions.explanation: Palestinian Islamist group Hamas launched the biggest attack on Israel in years, firing at least 5,000 missiles rockets at it. In retaliation to it, Israel declared a ‘war’ and launched Operation “Iron Swords” to neutralise Hamas militants in Gaza. As per the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF), more than 1,000 Israelis have been killed in the war on Hamas.

questions.question: Which Indian armed Force unveiled its new ensign on its 91st anniversary on 8 October?
questions.explanation: The Chief of the Air Staff Air Chief Marshal VR Chaudhari unveiled a new Ensign for the force, as it marked its 91st anniversary. It is also celebrated as the Air Force Day on October 8. The new ensign includes the Air Force Crest in the top right corner of the Ensign, towards the fly side. To mark the day, the IAF organised Air Force Day parade and air display in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh.
